rationale: No conflict. Educ. Code §13.281 governs incentive aid for consolidated districts and contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: Sec. 13.281. INCENTIVE AID. (a) A school district created after August 22, 1963, through consolidation may qualify for incentive aid payments from the state.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase; no cross-reference or dependency found.
